历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 18364 → 18808 → 17009 → 45216 → 35878. In 2024, the nursing major group lowered it to 45216, but it rebounded to 35878 in 2025, with the main major group actually stable in the 17000–19000 range. The 2025 baseline is about 35878; from 2021 to 2025, the number of science enrollment slots was 58, 58, 57, 63, and 61 respectively; in 2026, the plan is 59 slots, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.3%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to an inappropriate recruitment announcement causing public backlash, but the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which has a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity is average (76th overall), with moderate attention; no obvious admission gaps or breaks have been recorded; Plant Protection is rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the university, directly related to agricultural enrollment majors (e.g., Plant Production), attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular socially, closely matching the physics category enrollment majors at this university; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 268,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025, with competition basically unchanged; Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, with a moderate geographical distance from Jiangxi Province, and cross-provincial enrollment accounts for about 3.3% (2025), at a medium level; no significant regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 35878, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-3.3%), the increased attractiveness from the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (85th), along with the negative reputation and slight increase in examinee numbers, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 34972, with a range of 34472–35472.
